title: Collection Persistence, Versioned Schemas, Atomic Replacement, and Restore · Go Retrieval
summary: A delayed ranger review reconstructs collection persistence, versioned schemas, atomic replacement, and restore from revision, command, arguments, request identity, response fixture, state transition, cache decision, goroutine ownership, output, failure, cleanup, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for versioned atomic offline collection store after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugg…
objectives: Keep browser lessons on pure byte models and place native filesystem effects behind an injected save and load port.
Define version, application identity, timestamp policy, records, provenance, and checksum or integrity scope with deterministic encoding.
Bound bytes, decode exactly one document, validate schema and every record, reject duplicates, and preserve the last valid in-memory state on error.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Pokedex product engineering and Go Separate evidence from confidence · Review Pokedex Go Migration…
steps.instruction:
review case — A review Go team handles case 3557 during a disconnected community-lab recovery drill. Build deterministic Go evidence to validate versioned collection bytes and prove failure-safe atomic replacement and restore; browser code must remain deterministic and side-effect-free; then change one command, argument, EOF, or output-width condition and preserve the session contract. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original fixtures only. Real PokéAPI traffic, DNS, sockets, TLS, host files, terminals, signals, race and leak claims, load, cross-platform packaging, accessibility review, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Test old, current, future, truncated, oversized, duplicate, corrupt, permission, interrupted-write, backup, and restore cases.

Inspect the Pokedex Go Migration Restore Tests trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
